calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-10-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jan-29-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
No appearance by defendants Lazaro Torres Ramos, individually and dba Lazaro Torres Trucking or Rafael Amauris Paez.
Amended Defaults were entered against defendants on January 12, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on January 5, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on January 16, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of the West, and against the Defaulted Defendants Lazaro Torres Ramos, individually and dba Lazaro Torres Trucking and Rafael Amauris Paez as follows:

Damages/Principal - $34,206.15.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,614.23.
Attorney's Fees - $2,500.00.
Costs - $550.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $39,870.38.

Additionally, the Court Orders that plaintiff Bank of the West is the owner of the leased equipment set forth in paragraph 3 of the Judgment.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-29-2008 Continued To Feb-23-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-04-2008 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jan-12-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-02-2008 Continued To Nov-21-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
